# delegate

**Instance Property**

The list view controller’s delegate or `nil` if the receiver doesn’t have a delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
@IBOutlet weak var delegate: (any NCWidgetListViewDelegate)? { get set }
```

## Discussion

A list view controller’s delegate provides a custom view controller for each object in [doc://com.apple.notificationcenter/documentation/NotificationCenter/NCWidgetListViewController/contents]. The delegate also performs editing-related functions, such as responding to interaction with an Add (+) button and reordering and removing rows.

To learn about the methods the delegate can implement, see [doc://com.apple.notificationcenter/documentation/NotificationCenter/NCWidgetListViewDelegate].

## Displaying and Editing List Content

- **NCWidgetListViewDelegate**: The interface for handling content display and editing in the list view of a macOS Today widget.
